description: You are a professional interpreter preparing for an international simultaneous interpretation conference session. Using Jitsi Meet at http://localhost:8080, set up a secure meeting room named 'RSI-IntlConf-2024'. Enable the waiting room/lobby feature, meeting password/room-lock protection, and the setting for all participants to start with their microphones muted. Set your display name to 'Lead Interpreter EN/FR' and copy the meeting invitation link to the clipboard. Document the complete meeting configuration in a report at /home/ga/Desktop/rsi_conference_report.txt, including the full meeting URL, enabled security features, participant access instructions, and audio/mute policies.
